channel.title: +Fungi on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +Fungi on Vishvas's notes

item.title: +Fungal
item.description: Importance It might also help more rapid detection because these mycosis are super-destructive. Hence, it is important the molecular biologists develop & standardize the primers for detecting these. Epidemiology Comorbidities Immune suppression (eg. with steroids) Diabetes majority of cases arise in patients with diabetes with high ketone concentration in blood. Symptoms Facial pain. pain in eye, protrusion of orbit, loss of vision. Nasal blockage / brown discharge Headache. Black lesions on upper inside of mouth.
